Title: Retro Sunset Cityscape Skyline Pop Art Aesthetic Sticker
Description:
Capture the vibrant energy of the city with this stunning retro-futuristic sticker. Inspired by 80s synthwave aesthetics and Miami Vice vibes, this design features a glowing orange and yellow sunset backdrop over a modern, stylized skyline.

The clean lines and bold, geometric shapes give this piece a vibrant Pop Art feel, making it an instant eye-catcher.

  • Perfect for: Laptops, notebooks, car bumpers, or any surface needing a dose of nostalgic color.
  • Design Details: Features stylized skyscrapers, sleek flying cars, and a dramatic gradient sunset, all rendered in striking cool blue and warm orange tones.
  • Vibe: Ideal for those who love synthwave, vaporwave, retro pop culture, and vibrant, maximalist aesthetics.

This high-quality sticker adds an artistic, pop-culture flair to your everyday items, turning mundane objects into miniature works of art.
